title: Closed: Immigrate through the Home Care Worker Immigration pilots - Canada.ca
content:
## Closed: Immigrate through the Home Care Worker Immigration pilots
The pilots are closed while we focus on processing existing applications. We understand that this will be disappointing for prospective applicants. Get more information on this closure .
These pilots offer permanent residence to skilled workers who want to work in home child care or home support in Canada.
- Home Care Worker Immigration Pilot: Child Care
- Home Care Worker Immigration Pilot: Home Support
Each pilot has 2 application streams:
- Applicants not working in Canada
Workers in Canada Closed
Applicants not working in Canada Closed
